title: Bali, Indonesia
description: Bali is a world-renowned Indonesian island province known for its forested volcanic mountains, iconic rice paddies, beaches, and coral reefs. It serves as a major cultural hub featuring elaborate Hindu temples, traditional dance performances, and vibrant local markets. It offers a unique blend of spiritual retreats, adventure sports, and luxurious beach resorts.
hotels: Four Seasons Resort Bali at Sayan
travel_methods: The most common way to arrive is by flying into I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS). On the island, the best way to travel is by renting a private car with a driver, using ride-hailing apps like Grab or Gojek, or renting a scooter for short distances.
